## PR type

PR type: implementation

formal run executed: false

scientific review required: false

implementation merge required before formal run: true

## Scope

- [ ] This PR contains implementation, config, schema, runner, validator, tests, and/or runbook changes only.
- [ ] No formal research result or downstream gate is being submitted.
- [ ] The next formal run will use the merge commit on `main`.

## Validation

- [ ] Engineering CI profiles and contract tests pass.
- [ ] No research definition, parameter, formal artifact, or scientific conclusion changed.

## Risks and rollback

Describe risks and the revert or follow-up implementation path.
